message: Node started: Given a list of N bounding rectangles (x_min_i, y_min_i, x_max_i, y_max_i) from the spatial partitioner, a list of N requested points (x_i, y_i), and a list of N target areas (A_i), refine each rectangle to maximize advertiser satisfaction. For each index i, find a new rectangle (rx_min_i, ry_min_i, rx_max_i, ry_max_i) such that: 1) The rectangle is contained within the bounding rectangle from the first helper. 2) The point (x_i, y_i) is inside the new rectangle. 3) The area of the new rectangle is as close to A_i as possible. The output must be a list of N refined rectangles: [(rx_min_1, ry_min_1, rx_max_1, ry_max_1), ..., (rx_min_N, ry_min_N, rx_max_N, ry_max_N)].
